// about

A bit about me

I'm a 3rd year IT student at Cebu Institute of Technology – University, specializing in developing games and websites with Java, JavaScript, and HTML. I work on projects ranging from modern web applications and mobile apps to interactive games.

I was born and raised in the Queen City of the South, Cebu City.

My goal for now is to gain experience and build applications that can genuinely help solve real problems. Beyond that, I want to explore the world of artificial intelligence — learning how to integrate AI tools and techniques into my own projects to build smarter, more intuitive applications down the line.

Recent certifications

The Final Compilation

JavaJava Swing GUITurn-Based RPGTeam Project

The Final Compilation was created to combine storytelling, strategy, and object-oriented programming concepts into one interactive RPG turn-based game. The project was inspired by the pressure and experiences students encounter during programming examinations, particularly in Java and coding-related subjects.

Instead of presenting programming concepts in a traditional application, the developers transformed them into an immersive fantasy adventure where players experience challenges, decision-making, and progression through gameplay. The game was designed not only for entertainment but also to showcase the developers' knowledge and implementation of Object-Oriented Programming concepts such as Encapsulation, Inheritance, Polymorphism, and Abstraction.

Through the use of Java GUI, battle systems, save mechanics, file handling, sound integration, and scene transitions, the project demonstrates both technical programming skills and creativity in game development. The game also promotes strategic thinking, problem-solving, and player engagement through interactive battles, item collection, and story-driven exploration — reflecting a passion for programming, game design, and teamwork.

Back to portfolio

NutriX

KotlinAndroidMVP PatternRoom Database

NutriX is an Android calorie and macro tracker built with Kotlin using the MVP architecture pattern and a local Room database. A short onboarding flow collects biological sex, activity level, and body stats to calculate a personalized daily calorie goal using the Mifflin-St Jeor equation, then tracks progress against protein, fat, and carb targets right from the home dashboard.
